channel.title: DeHub Blog
channel.description: News, product updates and Web3 guides from DeHub — the open source, user-owned social platform.

item.title: DeHub vs DePaul DeHUB vs Rowan DEHub: Which One Are You Looking For?
item.description: Three different things share the name dehub. Here is how to tell the DeHub Web3 social network apart from DePaul and Rowan university portals.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: DHB Token Explained + How to Buy DeHub in the UK (Step-by-Step)
item.description: How to buy DHB token in the UK, explained clearly: what $DHB does, which chains it runs on, where it trades, and a careful step-by-step for UK buyers.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: What is DeHub?
item.description: DeHub is the open source, user-owned and censorship-resistant social platform for Web3 creators and communities. Who we are, how it works, the DHB token, and how creators earn.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: What Is Watch-to-Earn? How DeHub Actually Pays You to Watch (2026)
item.description: What is watch to earn? A plain-English guide to how watch-to-earn works, why it exists, honest earnings caveats, and how DeHub pays you to watch on-chain.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Best Watch-to-Earn Platforms 2026 (Honest, Tested for Real Payouts)
item.description: An honest ranking of the best watch to earn platforms 2026: which watch-to-earn apps pay real money, which have quietly pivoted, and which to avoid.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Is Watch-to-Earn Legit? How Much You Can Really Earn (Honest 2026 Data)
item.description: Is watch to earn legit or a scam? An honest 2026 breakdown of realistic earnings, the red flags to avoid, and a checklist to vet any platform before you sign up.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Cheelee Alternative: DeHub vs Cheelee vs Theta.tv vs XCAD (2026)
item.description: Looking for a Cheelee alternative? Compare DeHub vs Cheelee, Theta.tv and XCAD Network on cost, payouts and features to pick the best watch-to-earn app in 2026.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Tokenised Subscriptions Explained: On-Chain Memberships You Can Resell for Royalties
item.description: Tokenised subscriptions are on-chain memberships you own, resell on a secondary market, and that pay the creator a royalty on every resale. Here is how they work.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: The UK Creator Guide to Leaving TikTok for a Platform You Own (2026)
item.description: Looking for a TikTok alternative UK creators actually own? See how a 90% revenue-share, crypto-paying Web3 platform beats TikTok Creator Rewards in 2026.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Free Play-to-Earn Games With No Investment (2026): Including a Crypto MMA Battle Royale
item.description: The honest 2026 guide to play to earn games without investment: which free P2E titles actually pay, which hide NFT gates, and how to start earning with no deposit.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Last Chad Standing: Inside the World-First MMA Play-to-Earn Game
item.description: Last Chad Standing is the MMA play to earn game from DeHub: a licensed-fighter battle royale where you earn $DHB on Base. How it works and how to play.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Watch-to-Earn vs Play-to-Earn vs Move-to-Earn: The 2026 X-to-Earn Explainer
item.description: Watch to earn vs play to earn vs move-to-earn, explained. What x-to-earn means in 2026, the honest pros, cons and which models actually last.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Decentralised Social Media Explained: A British Guide (2026)
item.description: What is decentralised social media, how does it work, and why it matters for UK creators in 2026. A plain-English guide to user-owned, Web3 social media.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Best Decentralised Social Media Platforms 2026: DeHub vs Bluesky, Farcaster, Lens & Mastodon
item.description: The best decentralized social media platforms of 2026 compared: Bluesky, Mastodon, Farcaster, Lens and DeHub. Which decentralised network actually pays creators?
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Web3 Live Streaming: The Decentralised Twitch Alternative That Pays Creators
item.description: A web3 live streaming platform lets creators own their channel, take on-chain tips and avoid sudden demonetisation. How the decentralised Twitch alternative works.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Play-to-Earn in the UK 2026: Games, Real Earnings & HMRC Tax Explained
item.description: Play to earn UK 2026: is it legal, which games actually pay British players, and how HMRC taxes crypto gaming rewards. A practical, hedged guide from DeHub.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: We're Finally Here — A Major DeHub Update
item.description: After 5 years of development, DeHub is ready to challenge legacy media. Web app launch, fighter battle royale, airdrops, and the flywheel begins.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Development Update: The DeHub Era Starts - Final Updates and Bug Fixes Shipping in Coming Days
item.description: DeHub development update — final updates and bug fixes shipping soon as we begin app promotions. Web app and Google Play updates coming in days, with Apple listing to follow.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Town Hall Overview: $200,000 Private Sale Complete, Partner TGE March, New Pools, Added LP and More!
item.description: DeHub Town Hall recap — $200,000 private sale complete, TGE timeline confirmed for March 2026, new liquidity pools, public sale mechanics, and an accelerated growth strategy.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Yearly Wrap Up and 2026 Roadmap
item.description: DeHub's 2025 year in review — from Coinbase listing and Google Play launch to BNB Chain recognition — plus the full 2026 roadmap including Last Chad Standing, Apple App Store, DePIN, and more.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team
